name: cynthia aronson

transcripts.q3: I am current with my CPR, my first aid mines, Arizona fingerprint clearance card. I have worked in health care for over 18 years and with children also with children with autism and I'm very interested and working with up kid.
transcripts.q6: And separate them and ask them why they hit them and if they would apologize and, of course, make sure that the child wasn't heard.
transcripts.q7: The smiles, the laughter. The kids of all ages that are just curious and want to learn in my life experience. Hopefully will help them.

ai_summary: Cynthia has 18+ years in healthcare with experience working with children including those with autism, and holds current CPR/first aid and Arizona fingerprint clearance. She is drawn to UpKid for the joy of watching children learn and grow.
